justification: The diff successfully migrates to Jakarta EE (javax -> jakarta), updates Spring/Hibernate to modern versions, adopts constructor injection (removing @Autowired), uses pattern matching for instanceof, and String.formatted(). However, it misses updating spring-data-jpa and postgresql-connector versions, and the test file change is incomplete (only imports changed, no test methods updated to JUnit 5). The pom.xml also has a formatting issue with the new junit-jupiter dependency indentation.
